title: Guardrails for money movement: Integrating Stripe MCP with Portia AI
author: About the authors
text:
Prior to setting up Portia AI Mounir led Product for bank-as-a-service in Stripe EMEA. During his time at Google prior to that he also led the launch of Google Pay in 30 European markets.
Explore our guides and examples to integrate Stripe.
